Module CST239Milestone
Package service

Class StoreFront

  • java.lang.Object
    • service.StoreFront
  • public class StoreFront
extends java.lang.Object
    Coordinates the InventoryManager and ShoppingCart. This is the main "business logic" class called by the console app.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      StoreFront()
      Creates a StoreFront with a new inventory manager and shopping cart.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void cancelPurchase​(java.lang.String productName, int qty)
      Cancels a purchase by removing items from the cart and adding stock back to inventory.
      java.math.BigDecimal getCartTotal()
      Returns the current cart total.
      InventoryManager getInventoryManager()  
      ShoppingCart getShoppingCart()  
      void initializeStore()
      Initializes the store inventory and clears the cart.
      void purchaseProduct​(java.lang.String productName, int qty)
      Purchases a product by removing stock from inventory and adding it to the cart.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • StoreFront

        public StoreFront()
        Creates a StoreFront with a new inventory manager and shopping cart.

    • Method Detail

      • initializeStore

        public void initializeStore()
        Initializes the store inventory and clears the cart. This should be called when the Store Front starts up.

      • getInventoryManager

        public InventoryManager getInventoryManager()
        Returns:
        inventory manager

      • getShoppingCart

        public ShoppingCart getShoppingCart()
        Returns:
        shopping cart

      • purchaseProduct

        public void purchaseProduct​(java.lang.String productName,
                            int qty)
        Purchases a product by removing stock from inventory and adding it to the cart.
        Parameters:
        productName - name of product
        qty - quantity to purchase

      • cancelPurchase

        public void cancelPurchase​(java.lang.String productName,
                           int qty)
        Cancels a purchase by removing items from the cart and adding stock back to inventory.
        Parameters:
        productName - name of product
        qty - quantity to cancel

      • getCartTotal

        public java.math.BigDecimal getCartTotal()
        Returns the current cart total.
        Returns:
        total price of cart items
